bead.title: Rewrite ROADMAP.md — all Phase 1 items are already done
Fix CORS: allow_origins wildcard + allow_credentials=True is invalid in browsers
Persist EnergyPredictor model weights across restarts
Replace datetime.utcnow() with datetime.now(timezone.utc) everywhere
Replace bare except:pass with typed exception handling in ai.py
Migrate @app.on_event startup to FastAPI lifespan context manager
Add Alembic migrations — create_all won't handle schema evolution
Agent-First CLI — make LifeOS a tool Hermes can use
S1: Persist EnergyPredictor model weights to DB across restarts
S1: Add click to requirements.txt and lifeos entry point to setup
S1: Build cli/main.py — lifeos brief + lifeos sync commands
S1: Build cli/formatters.py — json + text output formatters with stdout/stderr contract
S1: Configure OpenClaw cron for 7am morning brief (sync oura → generate brief → deliver Discord)
S1: Verify .env has OURA_TOKEN + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL — test end-to-end
S1 ACCEPTANCE: Morning brief delivered to Discord for 3 consecutive days
S2: lifeos log energy|mood|note commands
S2: lifeos status command (fast snapshot, no AI)
S3: lifeos goal list|add|update|review commands
S3: lifeos pattern command (statistical correlation analysis)
S3: lifeos weekly command (AI weekly review)

fields.description: EnergyPredictor in src/energy_predictor.py trains a linear regression model but never persists weights. get_energy_predictor() returns a new untrained singleton on every cold start — meaning the predictor never learns. Fix: serialize model params via get_model_params(), store to DB or file on train, load via load_model_params() on first predict call. See REVIEW.md item 3 and pol-69ed (Polis-level bead). This must ship before cli/brief or brief quality is degraded on every invocation.

New files: cli/__init__.py, cli/main.py. Use click. Both commands are thin wrappers over the service layer — NO business logic in CLI. Use: from src.database import SessionLocal, init_db / from src.insights_service import InsightsService. Brief output: --format text (Discord markdown, default), --format json ({status, data:{content,date,confidence}, generated_at, tokens_used}). Sync output: 'Synced N records' to stdout. Errors to stderr always. Exit codes: 0=success, 1=bad args, 2=system failure. Depends on pol-e603 (formatters).

New file: cli/formatters.py. Provides: format_brief(insight, format) -> str, format_sync_result(result, format) -> str, format_error(msg) -> str. JSON schema: {status: ok|error, data: {...}, generated_at: ISO8601}. Text format: clean markdown suitable for direct Discord paste. Must enforce stdout/stderr contract: formatters write data to stdout (via return value), never to stderr.

Create OpenClaw cron at 07:00 Europe/Helsinki. Bash sequence: (1) cd /home/polis/projects/lifeOS && source .venv/bin/activate (2) lifeos sync oura || true (3) lifeos sync calendar || true (4) BRIEF=$(lifeos brief --format text) (5) deliver BRIEF to Discord — via relay send or direct DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL POST. Cron is a Sprint 1 acceptance criterion — it must run and deliver a real brief. Not 'set up', actually delivered.

Pre-flight checklist for Sprint 1: (1) OURA_TOKEN set in .env and valid — test with: lifeos sync oura (2) DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL set and working — test with a curl POST (3) DB initialised: lifeos brief runs without error (4) Oura data present in DB — at least 7 days to seed the AI context. If Oura token missing, get from https://cloud.ouraring.com/personal-access-tokens. Perttu must provide these credentials.

Epic tracking the full agent-first redesign of LifeOS. PRD at: /home/polis/projects/lifeOS/docs/PRD-agent-first.md. Three sprints: S1=wire it (brief+sync CLI + cron), S2=capture (log+status), S3=intelligence (goal+pattern+weekly). Sprint gates: S2 only starts after S1 acceptance test passes for 14 days. S3 only starts after S2 running in practice.

Update ROADMAP.md to reflect actual implementation state. All Phase 1 items are built — mark as done and add current gaps (CLI redesign, cron wiring, predictor persistence). DONE WHEN: every item in ROADMAP.md has correct ✅/❌ status matching what exists in src/.

In src/api.py, allow_origins=['*'] + allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec (browsers reject credentialed requests with wildcard origin). Fix: set allow_origins=['http://localhost:8080'] or remove allow_credentials=True. DONE WHEN: FastAPI starts without CORS issues and browser fetch from localhost works.
Add click>=8.0 to requirements.txt. Create pyproject.toml with entry point: lifeos = src.cli.main:cli. Run pip install -e . in venv. DONE WHEN: which lifeos resolves and lifeos --help prints usage.

Sprint 1 acceptance gate. DONE WHEN: (1) lifeos brief --format text produces a valid brief, (2) lifeos sync oura pulls real Oura data, (3) OpenClaw cron fires at 07:00 Helsinki, (4) morning brief appears in Discord for 3 consecutive days. Only closeable after Perttu confirms receipt of 3 briefs.

In src/ai.py, predict_energy() and analyze_patterns() have bare except: pass that silently swallows all errors. Replace with except (json.JSONDecodeError, ValueError) as e: and add logging. DONE WHEN: grep -rn 'except:' src/ai.py returns 0 matches.

Add Alembic to the project. alembic init, generate initial migration from current models.py, verify alembic upgrade head and alembic downgrade -1 both succeed on a test DB. DONE WHEN: alembic history shows initial migration and round-trip works.
Replace all datetime.utcnow() calls across src/ with datetime.now(timezone.utc). Python 3.12 deprecates utcnow(). DONE WHEN: grep -rn 'utcnow' src/ returns 0 matches and tests pass.
Replace @app.on_event('startup') in src/api.py with asynccontextmanager lifespan pattern. DONE WHEN: uvicorn starts with no deprecation warnings about on_event.

Implement lifeos log energy|mood|note commands per CLI Design Sprint 2 spec in docs/PRD-agent-first.md. DONE WHEN: lifeos log energy 4 --note 'test' creates a JournalEntry in DB and prints confirmation.

Implement lifeos status command per CLI Design Sprint 2 spec in docs/PRD-agent-first.md. Fast snapshot: last sleep score, calendar density, active goals, 7-day energy trend. No AI calls. DONE WHEN: lifeos status returns in <1s and includes sleep/calendar/goals data.

Implement lifeos goal list|add|update|review commands per CLI Design Sprint 3 spec in docs/PRD-agent-first.md. DONE WHEN: full CRUD + AI review working, lifeos goal list --format json returns valid JSON.

Implement lifeos pattern command per CLI Design Sprint 3 spec in docs/PRD-agent-first.md. Uses existing PatternAnalyzer (real scipy stats). DONE WHEN: lifeos pattern --days 30 returns correlations with p-values.
Implement lifeos weekly command per CLI Design Sprint 3 spec in docs/PRD-agent-first.md. AI-powered weekly review. DONE WHEN: lifeos weekly --format text returns a readable week summary.

EnergyPredictor in src/energy_predictor.py trains a linear regression model but never persists weights. Fix: serialize via get_model_params() to data/model_weights.json on train, load via load_model_params() from that file on first predict call. File-based (not DB) to avoid Alembic dependency. DONE WHEN: train model, restart Python, model loads from file and produces predictions without retraining.

Create OpenClaw cron at 07:00 Europe/Helsinki. Sequence: (1) cd /home/polis/projects/lifeOS && source .venv/bin/activate (2) lifeos sync oura || true (3) lifeos sync calendar || true (4) BRIEF= (5) POST brief to Discord via DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL using curl. Uses direct webhook — no relay dependency. DONE WHEN: cron fires and brief appears in Discord.

bead.title: S1: CLI smoke tests — verify brief and sync commands with test DB

fields.description: Write CLI smoke tests: (1) lifeos brief --format json outputs valid parseable JSON, (2) lifeos brief --format text outputs non-empty markdown, (3) lifeos sync with mock config returns expected output, (4) exit codes correct (0 success, 1 bad args, 2 system error). Use test DB fixture from tests/conftest.py. DONE WHEN: pytest tests/test_cli.py passes.
